# Project Guidelines

<!--
  POINTER FILE — the single source of truth is /AGENTS.md at the repo root.
  GitHub Copilot reads AGENTS.md natively; this file exists only for older
  Copilot setups that read copilot-instructions.md. Edit AGENTS.md, not this.
-->

Follow the instructions in the root `AGENTS.md` file: stack defaults, build
commands, code style, architecture, testing, security, and git conventions
are all defined there.

Copilot-specific additions only below this line.
